translations.en: I'm finishing my homework before noon.
translations.es: Termino la tarea antes del mediodía.
translations.de: Ich mache meine Hausaufgaben vor Mittag fertig.
translations.it: Finisco i compiti prima di mezzogiorno.
translations.yue: 我會喺中午前做完功課。
translations.ru: Я закончу домашнее задание до полудня.
translations.pt: Vou terminar a lição de casa antes do meio-dia.
translations.he: אני מסיים את שיעורי הבית לפני הצהריים.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ hoàn thành bài tập trước giờ trưa.
translations.nl: Ik maak mijn huiswerk voor het middaguur af.
translations.uk: Я завершу домашнє завдання до полудня.
translations.hu: Dél előtt befejezem a házi feladatomat.
translations.hi: मैं दोपहर से पहले अपना होमवर्क पूरा कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Θα τελειώσω την εργασία για το σπίτι πριν το μεσημέρι.
translations.nb: Jeg gjør ferdig leksene før klokken tolv.
translations.id: Saya akan menyelesaikan pekerjaan rumah sebelum siang.
translations.sv: Jag gör klart läxan innan tolv.
translations.ro: Îmi termin tema înainte de prânz.
translations.da: Jeg bliver færdig med lektierne inden klokken tolv.
translations.ja: 正午までに宿題を終わらせます。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject je elided before a vowel plus finite verb achever; present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular, agreeing with devoir.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of J'achève.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Common noun (time of day); object of the preposition avant.

translations.es: Puedes terminar de lavar los platos.
translations.de: Du kannst den Abwasch fertig machen.
translations.it: Puoi finire di lavare i piatti.
translations.pt: Você pode terminar de lavar a louça.
translations.he: אתה יכול לסיים לשטוף את הכלים.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể rửa nốt bát đĩa.
translations.hi: तुम बर्तन धोना पूरा कर सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να τελειώσεις το πλύσιμο των πιάτων.
translations.ja: 皿洗いを終わらせていいよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Modal verb pouvoir; present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects the infinitive achever.
Infinitive verb complement of peux.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of vaisselle.
Common noun (feminine singular, mass); direct object of achever.

sentences.target: On achève la peinture demain matin.

translations.fr: On achève la peinture demain matin.
translations.en: We're finishing the painting tomorrow morning.
translations.es: Terminamos de pintar mañana por la mañana.
translations.de: Wir beenden das Streichen morgen früh.
translations.ko: 우리는 내일 아침에 페인트칠을 끝낼 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们明天早上刷完油漆。
translations.yue: 我哋聽朝朝早會油完漆。
translations.pt: Vamos terminar a pintura amanhã de manhã.
translations.he: אנחנו מסיימים את הצביעה מחר בבוקר.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ hoàn thành việc sơn vào sáng mai.
translations.nl: We maken het schilderwerk morgenochtend af.
translations.hu: Holnap reggel fejezzük be a festést.
translations.hi: हम पेंटिंग कल सुबह खत्म कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Τελειώνουμε το βάψιμο αύριο το πρωί.
translations.nb: Vi blir ferdige med malingen i morgen tidlig.
translations.id: Kami akan menyelesaikan pengecatan besok pagi.
translations.sv: Vi blir klara med målningen i morgon bitti.
translations.da: Vi bliver færdige med at male i morgen tidlig.
translations.ja: 私たちは明日の朝に塗装を終えます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal pronoun often used colloquially for ‘we’; grammatical 3rd person singular subject.
Finite verb achever; present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of peinture.
Common noun (feminine singular); direct object of achève.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Common noun (masculine singular) in the fixed temporal expression demain matin; functions as a temporal modifier.

sentences.target: Vous achevez le puzzle sans moi.

translations.fr: Vous achevez le puzzle sans moi.
translations.en: You guys are finishing the puzzle without me.
translations.es: Están terminando el rompecabezas sin mí.
translations.de: Ihr macht das Puzzle ohne mich fertig.
translations.it: State finendo il puzzle senza di me.
translations.ko: 너희는 나 없이 퍼즐을 맞추고 있네.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们正要在没有我的情况下把拼图拼完。
translations.yue: 你哋冇我就嚟砌好拼圖。
translations.pt: Vocês estão terminando o quebra-cabeça sem mim.
translations.vi: Các bạn đang hoàn thành trò ghép hình mà không có tôi.
translations.nl: Jullie maken de puzzel zonder mij af.
translations.hi: तुम लोग मेरे बिना पज़ल पूरा कर रहे हो.
translations.nb: Dere gjør ferdig puslespillet uten meg.
translations.id: Kalian sedang menyelesaikan puzzle tanpa aku.
translations.sv: Ni gör klart pusslet utan mig.
translations.da: I gør puslespillet færdigt uden mig.
translations.ja: あなたたちは私抜きでパズルを完成させている。

Vous achevez le puzzle sans moi.
en: I'm finishing my homework before noon.
We're finishing the painting tomorrow morning.
You guys are finishing the puzzle without me.
